projects.name: JobIntel Agent
projects.description: A multi-agent CrewAI pipeline that sources jobs across LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, and company career sites, scores fit, validates posting recency and legitimacy, and ranks results by priority.
highlights: Intent-based job matching using semantic vector embeddings
Automated end-to-end intelligence delivery via SendGrid email report

projects.name: Financial Analyst RAG System
projects.description: A production RAG pipeline for real-time multi-company financial analysis that applies the RAGAS evaluation framework to benchmark retrieval faithfulness and answer relevance.
highlights: Engineered HuggingFace query-expansion for cross-company comparison accuracy
Implemented LLM output guardrails to constrain responses to grounded, cited content

projects.name: Credit Risk Assessment System
projects.description: A full-stack ML system that investigates severe class imbalance in a 10,000-record credit dataset using SMOTE oversampling and trains an XGBoost classifier achieving 88% accuracy.
highlights: Architected full inference pipeline containerised with Docker and CI/CD via GitHub Actions

projects.name: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Agent
projects.description: A stateful AI agent built and deployed using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph that achieves 88% accuracy and implements AgentCore Memory for persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval.
highlights: Built and deployed a stateful AI agent using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph
Implemented AgentCore Memory for persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval

projects.name: Job Intel Agent (Current Project)
projects.description: A multi-agent job discovery system using CrewAI + Groq + Ollama that fetches jobs from 15 sources, scores jobs using Groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile with intent matching, and sends HTML digest via Brevo SMTP.
highlights: Multi-agent job discovery system using CrewAI + Groq + Ollama
Fully automated via GitHub Actions daily cron at 8 AM IST

experience.description: Designed and shipped LangChain-based RAG pipelines serving live end users, optimised vector retrieval, and applied systematic prompt evaluation and failure analysis to reduce hallucination rates.

hackathons.name: DevOnboard — AI Repository Intelligence Platform
hackathons.description: Individually built an AI platform that ingests any GitHub repo via URL, parses its structure and source code, and returns cited context-aware answers to developer onboarding questions.

hackathons.name: Smart Attendance System
hackathons.description: Led architecture design, sprint planning, and task delegation for a 6-member team and architected a real-time WebSocket layer validated under 100+ concurrent users with zero data loss.

hackathons.name: SITNOVATE — Real-Time Chat Engine
hackathons.description: Scoped and delivered a JWT-secured real-time chat system entirely within 24 hours.

Python, Java, JavaScript, LLMs, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Prompt Engineering, RAGAS, HuggingFace, Vector Embeddings, ChromaDB, XGBoost, SMOTE, FastAPI, Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS S3, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, WebSockets, AWS (Bedrock, AgentCore, S3), Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL, React.js, React, Groq API, Ollama, BeautifulSoup, Brevo SMTP, Playwright, SendGrid, LinkedIn/Indeed/Naukri APIs

LeetCode: 1538 rating, 400+ problems solved

KEY PROJECTS:
- JobIntel Agent: A multi-agent CrewAI pipeline that sources jobs across LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, and company career sites, scores fit, validates posting recency and legitimacy, and ranks results by priority. Stack: Python, CrewAI, LangChain, Playwright, SendGrid, LinkedIn/Indeed/Naukri APIs, Vector Embeddings. Intent-based job matching using semantic vector embeddings; Automated end-to-end intelligence delivery via SendGrid email report
- Financial Analyst RAG System: A production RAG pipeline for real-time multi-company financial analysis that applies the RAGAS evaluation framework to benchmark retrieval faithfulness and answer relevance. Stack: Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, HuggingFace, RAGAS, AWS S3, GitHub Actions. Engineered HuggingFace query-expansion for cross-company comparison accuracy; Implemented LLM output guardrails to constrain responses to grounded, cited content
- Credit Risk Assessment System: A full-stack ML system that investigates severe class imbalance in a 10,000-record credit dataset using SMOTE oversampling and trains an XGBoost classifier achieving 88% accuracy. Stack: React.js, FastAPI, XGBoost, Docker, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Trained XGBoost classifier achieving 88% accuracy; Architected full inference pipeline containerised with Docker and CI/CD via GitHub Actions
- AWS Bedrock AgentCore Agent: A stateful AI agent built and deployed using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph that achieves 88% accuracy and implements AgentCore Memory for persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval. Stack: Python, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Docker, FastAPI, XGBoost, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Built and deployed a stateful AI agent using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph; Implemented AgentCore Memory for persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval
- Job Intel Agent (Current Project): A multi-agent job discovery system using CrewAI + Groq + Ollama that fetches jobs from 15 sources, scores jobs using Groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile with intent matching, and sends HTML digest via Brevo SMTP. Stack: Python, CrewAI 1.x, Groq API, Ollama, BeautifulSoup, GitHub Actions. Multi-agent job discovery system using CrewAI + Groq + Ollama; Fully automated via GitHub Actions daily cron at 8 AM IST
